briefs.title: Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation Amended — New Entries Added to Schedule 1
briefs.summary: BC updated its Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation on Feb 4, 2026, adding new items to Schedule 1 — the list of local government bylaws that can be enforced through fines (tickets) instead of court.
briefs.action_required: Check if your local municipality added new bylaw offences that could result in fines for your business.

key_dates.label: BC Bylaw Notice Enforcement Regulation Schedule 1 amendments take effect
